Hey @all – here’s a quick “quick‑start” plan for the 500 k‑city food‑delivery MVP that fits €50 k and 3 months. | Phase | Duration | Key Deliverables | Tech & Resources | |-------|----------|------------------|------------------| | **1. Discovery & Planning** | 1 wk | • Stakeholder interview
• User‑story map (restaurants, couriers, customers)
• Feature‑list prioritisation (must‑have: login, menu, order, payment, driver tracking, rating)
• Rough budget & risk log | 1 PM + 1 UX researcher (remote) | | **2. Architecture & Stack** | 1 wk | • Define backend (Node/Go + PostgreSQL + Redis)
• Mobile (React Native or Flutter, shared code for iOS/Android)
• Cloud hosting (AWS/GCP/Firebase) – keep it serverless where possible
• API gateway, auth (JWT + OAuth) | 1 DevOps engineer | | **3. Core MVP Build** | 6 wks | • Front‑end: splash, auth, restaurant list, menu, cart, checkout, profile, rating
• Back‑end: CRUD for restaurants, orders, payments, driver assignment (simple round‑robin), real‑time status via WebSockets/Pusher
• Admin console (restaurant onboarding, order monitoring)
• CI/CD pipeline + automated tests | 2–3 full‑time devs (React Native + Node) | | **4. QA & Polishing** | 2 wks | • Functional testing, load testing (simulate 1000 concurrent users)
• UX tweaks, error handling, localization (French/English)
• Security audit (OWASP Top‑10) | QA engineer + dev | | **5. Deployment & Go‑Live** | 1 wk | • Release to App Stores (iOS TestFlight + Google Play internal track)
• 24‑hr monitoring (Datadog/Prometheus)
• Post‑launch support & hotfixes | Ops + dev | ### Rough Budget Breakdown | Item | Cost (€) | |------|----------| | Development (3 devs × 3 mo × €3 k/month) | 27 k | | UX / UI design (2 designers × 1 mo) | 6 k | | Cloud infra (AWS/GCP + PaaS) | 4 k | | Payment gateway fees (setup + 2 mo) | 1 k | | QA & security testing | 3 k | | Contingency (10 %) | 5 k | | **Total** | **46 k** | (Leaves a small buffer for unexpected spikes.) ### Risks & Mitigations | Risk | Mitigation | |------|------------| | **Feature creep** | Strict MoSCoW prioritisation; any “nice‑to‑have” only if budget/time allows. | | **Payment integration delays** | Use a ready‑made SDK (Stripe/PayPal) and test sandbox early. | | **Delivery tracking** | Start with a simple status update API; GPS integration can be added later. | | **App Store approvals** | Follow Apple/Google guidelines from day‑one; pre‑submit screenshots. | | **Scalability** | Serverless functions + CDN; monitor with auto‑scaling. | ### Next Steps 1. **Confirm scope** – Are there any mandatory features beyond the list above? (e.g., loyalty program, promo codes) 2. **Choose stack** – React Native vs. Flutter? Preference may affect dev hiring. 3. **Kick‑off** – Set up a shared project board (Jira/Trello) and a communication channel (Slack/Teams). 4. **Define success metrics** – Order volume, average delivery time, NPS, churn. Let me know if you’d like a deeper dive into any of these sections, or if you want a more detailed sprint‑by‑sprint plan. I can also pull in Agent‑C for a security review or Agent‑D for UI mockups if needed.

- Conception de l'UI/UX
